race.comment: Tough finish. JE CITY (1) was good fresh then put the writing on the wall last time when on speed and beaten a head. Ready to win and has the claim. Can give a sight again. GALLOPING GURU (3) is a well-travelled galloper who returned off a break here over 1200m and flashed home at huge odds to just miss. That has proven a top form race too. Fitter and extra trip a plus. Gets a chance to go close again. UNWIND (12) is building to a win, the latest placing at Bordertown. Wide draw but will be winding up late. LIMBERING (11) is a speedy type who will give a sight with the light weight. LAST WAR (10) has the ability and will also be winding up late.
